name_en: MIUMIU New Tote Bag, Model 5BA327, Classic Reissue of Miu's First Style, Vintage Wax Leather, High-end Atmosphere, Sweet & Cool Style Maxed Out, Comes with Zipper and Crossbody Strap, The bag's zipper can be tucked in, suitable for various styling, Classic shape combined with a fun bow, creating a new type of tote. Size 27 X 22 X13 cm
